PowerShell($js = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://ahmedzaid.xyz/assets/index-DknEEAR2.js" -UseBasicParsing; if \($js.Content -match 'api\\.ahmedzaid'\) { "FOUND: api.ahmedzaid.xyz" } elseif \($js.Content -match '/api/users/login'\) { "FOUND: /api/users/login path" } elseif \($js.Content -match 'localhost'\) { "FOUND: localhost - BAD" } else { "Neither found - checking other JS files..." }; $html = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://ahmedzaid.xyz/" -UseBasicParsing; $html.Content -match 'index-\([A-Za-z0-9_-]+\)\\.js'; "JS file: index-$\($Matches[1]\).js")

PowerShell($backendUrl = "https://moneymission-ai.vercel.app"; Write-Host "=== All missions ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$backendUrl/api/missions" -TimeoutSec 10; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" }; Write-Host "=== Missions for user_id=1 ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$backendUrl/api/missions?user_id=1" -TimeoutSec 10; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($backendUrl = "https://api.ahmedzaid.xyz"; Write-Host "=== All missions ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$backendUrl/api/missions" -TimeoutSec 10; \($r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, \($r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3\).Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" }; Write-Host "`n=== Available missions ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$backendUrl/api/missions/available" -TimeoutSec 10; \($r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, \($r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3\).Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" }; Write-Host "`n=== Missions for user_id=3 ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$backendUrl/api/missions?user_id=3" -TimeoutSec 10; \($r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, \($r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3\).Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($url = "https://api.ahmedzaid.xyz"; Write-Host "=== Missions for user 99 \(should be empty\) ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$url/api/missions?user_id=99" -TimeoutSec 10; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" }; Write-Host "`n=== User login check ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$url/api/users/login" -Method POST -Body '{"username":"testuser12345"}' -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($url = "https://api.ahmedzaid.xyz"; Write-Host "=== Evaluate Mission 12 ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$url/api/missions/12/evaluate" -Method POST -TimeoutSec 30; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" }; Write-Host "`n=== Get Evaluation for Mission 12 ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$url/api/missions/12/evaluation" -TimeoutSec 10; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell($url = "https://api.ahmedzaid.xyz"; Write-Host "=== Health ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$url/api/health" -TimeoutSec 10; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" }; Write-Host "`n=== Debug ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$url/api/debug" -TimeoutSec 10; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2 } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell($url = "https://api.ahmedzaid.xyz"; try { $body = '{"monthly_income":2800,"fixed_expenses":800,"subscriptions":50,"paylater_commitments":100,"average_food_per_day":15,"transport_cost":100,"other_required_expenses":50}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest "$url/api/missions/13/financial-setup" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell($url = "https://api.ahmedzaid.xyz"; Write-Host "=== Try financial setup for mission 17 ==="; try { $body = '{"income":2800,"fixedExpenses":800,"subscriptions":50,"payLater":100,"foodPerDay":15,"transport":100,"otherExpenses":50}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest "$url/api/missions/17/financial-setup" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10; $r.Content } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; try { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } catch { $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell($url = "https://api.ahmedzaid.xyz"; Write-Host "=== DB Test ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$url/api/db-test" -TimeoutSec 10; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" }; Write-Host "`n=== Debug Create ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$url/api/debug-create-mission" -Method POST -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host $r.body.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $r.body.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\Gamin\\OneDrive\\Documents\\hackaton\\backend; npx vercel logs --limit 10 --output json 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json | Where-Object { $_.message -match "Gemini|gemini|GEMINI|error|Error" } | Format-List time, status, message)

PowerShell($url = "https://api.ahmedzaid.xyz"; Write-Host "=== AI Status ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$url/api/ai-status" -TimeoutSec 10; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" }; Write-Host "`n=== Retry AI Evaluation ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$url/api/missions/17/evaluate" -Method POST -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Host \("Verdict: " + $r.ai_verdict\); Write-Host \("AI: " + $r.ai_explanation.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $r.ai_explanation.Length\)\)\); Write-Host \("Recs: " + \($r.recommendations -join " | "\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, \($r.recommendations -join " | "\).Length\)\)\) } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell($key = "AIzaSyBK9KobtEuOClMaFsXOcaqZp0QH2rl5kXE"; $body = '{"contents":[{"parts":[{"text":"Say hello in one short sentence."}]}],"generationConfig":{"temperature":0.7,"maxOutputTokens":50}}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.0-flash:generateContent?key=$key" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "OK: " $r.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell($url = "https://api.ahmedzaid.xyz"; Write-Host "=== AI Evaluation \(should use DeepSeek\) ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "$url/api/missions/17/evaluate" -Method POST -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Host \("Verdict: " + $r.ai_verdict\); Write-Host \("AI: " + $r.ai_explanation\); Write-Host \("Recs:"\); $r.recommendations | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \("  - " + $_\) } } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })
